channel.title: GitHub VBA Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of VBA in GitHub

item.title: Jonathan-LeRoux/IguanaTex
item.description: A PowerPoint add-in to insert LaTeX equations into PowerPoint presentations on Windows and Mac

item.title: joyfullservice/msaccess-vcs-addin
item.description: Synchronize your Access Forms, Macros, Modules, Queries, Reports, and more with a version control system.
